params.name: Eden Scepter
params.description: It is considered a relic of the ancient civilization of Eden, symbolizing absolute authority. The scepter holds immense power capable of manipulating the will and actions of mortals, with a specially designed tip to house the Apple of Eden. When combined, its power is greatly amplified, enough to sway the thoughts of mankind and even the course of history. The scepter has passed through the hands of many historical figures, from the Pharaohs of Egypt to the Popes of Rome, and to the Czars of Rus …
